channel.title: coin on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in coin on IT notes

item.title: storj
item.description: Setup up and configure your jail, then create user storj: pw useradd -n storj -m Clone and get and install latest version: git clone -b v1.14.7 https://github.com/storj/storj.git storj cd storj go install -race -v storj.io/storj/cmd/... Create a dir to contanin the identity and storage: mkdir /mnt/storj chown -R storj:storj /mnt/storj In the main host create the file system to be used in the jail: zfs create tank/storj Create fstat.
